Unaccompanied Minors (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,655,224Details
International Box Office $5,315,607
Worldwide Box Office $21,970,831
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $7,714,100
Total $7,714,100
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a Christmas Eve blizzard shuts down the airport, five stranded youths take the opportunity to run wild and have some fun. Racing with golf carts and sliding down baggage chutes, the kids create holiday pandemonium for an uptight airport official and his gullible assistant.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,815,474 (34.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.86 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:75.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,775 opening theaters/2,775 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $30,266,167

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 8th, 2006 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
Video Release: August 7th, 2007 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for mild rude humor and language
Running Time: 87 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: One Day
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Family Vacations, Extreme Weather
Social setting: Christmas
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
